company.name: Shenzhen MovePilot Robotics
company.italy_entry_goal: Win a first paid pilot with a mid-size Italian warehouse or logistics buyer

product.name: MP-800 Autonomous Mobile Robot
product.short_description: Autonomous mobile robot for internal transport of totes and small carts inside warehouses.
product.detailed_description: The MP-800 moves totes, cartons, and small carts between picking, packing, replenishment, and dispatch staging areas. It is designed for modular deployment without fixed conveyors and can start with operator tablet dispatch before deeper WMS integration.
primary_use_cases: Internal transport between picking and packing
Line-side material movement in light manufacturing
core_benefits: Reduce manual walking time for warehouse operators
Increase consistency of tote movement between zones
Deploy in a bounded route without redesigning the warehouse
Scale from two robots to a larger fleet after pilot validation
Lower upfront disruption than fixed conveyor automation

technical_specs.navigation: SLAM navigation with mapped routes and obstacle detection
technical_specs.fleet_management: Web dashboard for route status, task queue, robot health, and battery status

installation_requirements: Wi-Fi coverage along the selected route
Safety review of pedestrian and forklift interaction points

integration_options.description: Warehouse supervisor or operator manually assigns transport tasks during the first pilot.
Daily or hourly task list exported from WMS and imported into the fleet dashboard.
WMS creates transport tasks through API after IT review.

secondary_segment_hints: Retail logistics and fashion distribution centers
target_market.entry_goal: Secure a bounded first pilot that creates Italian operating evidence

proof_details.technical_specs: English technical sheet with payload, speed, battery, navigation, connectivity, and operating environment.

chinese_case_studies.process: Tote movement between picking and packing
chinese_case_studies.reported_result: Reduced operator walking time by 22 percent in the measured zone

chinese_case_studies.process: Internal transport from storage to packing
chinese_case_studies.reported_result: Improved task consistency during evening dispatch preparation

proof_details.ce_status: Vendor has a partial CE/safety summary and needs a buyer-ready one-page safety pack for the Italian pilot.
proof_details.support_model: Remote diagnostics from China available. No named Italian support partner yet. Vendor can provide first-week on-site engineer for demo period if budget allows.
proof_details.pricing_range: Pilot fee expected between EUR 18,000 and EUR 28,000 excluding travel, local partner support, and site preparation.
proof_details.warranty_summary: Standard hardware warranty available, but pilot-specific responsibility terms need to be written.

desired_pilot.ambition: 45-day limited pilot in one Italian warehouse zone
desired_pilot.preferred_process: Internal transport between picking and packing
desired_pilot.pilot_scope: One mapped route moving totes from picking aisles to packing benches in a 3PL or e-commerce fulfilment warehouse.

target_kpis.name: Totes moved per hour
target_kpis.target: Baseline plus 15 percent during stable pilot windows

target_kpis.name: Operator handoff time
target_kpis.target: Average handoff below 45 seconds after week 2

desired_pilot.next_commercial_step: If KPIs and support commitments are met, expand to 6 AMRs across picking-to-packing and dispatch staging.

known_constraints: No signed local maintenance partner yet
CE/safety summary is partial and must be made buyer-ready
ROI model is not localized to Italian warehouse assumptions
WMS integration should begin with operator tablet or CSV workflow to avoid long IT approval
Operator training pack needs Italian-language quick-start material

demo_expected_output.sales_pack_angle: Offer a low-risk, one-route AMR pilot that creates Italian operating proof before asking for a larger automation purchase.
